title: No Recipe Book Reborn
description: Removes the buttons for the recipe book.
body:
## No Recipe Book Reborn 
A complete and independent rewrite of the No Recipe Book mod (by Seneschal_Luwin) for Minecraft versions 1.16.5+.

 
This mod removes the button for the recipe book in the following GUIs:

- Player Inventory
- Crafting Table
- Furnace
- Smoker
- Blast Furnace

*If any were missed please let me know.*
